title: The Agent That Remembers Your Brand
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~42s. Featured brand: Reformation (real D2C fashion). Inspired by the @adrianabubori reel.
concept: The inspiration sells an AI video agent that holds your brand context across every shot instead of forgetting it. For Reformation, Masonry is that creative agent: set your product, brand and look once, give it one note, and every dreamy frame stays on brand, no managing models, no rebuilding context. Same beat structure and length as the inspiration, fully original copy.
audio: Soft, dreamy ambient track with an airy spoken voice-over. Slow, floating cuts that match the surreal visuals; let the beat breathe between shots.

beats.vo: What if your AI video remembered everything?
beats.visual: A model in a flowing Reformation dress drifts against soft clouds, dreamy and editorial. Ethereal open that stops the scroll.

beats.vo: Your product. Your brand. Held in every shot.
beats.visual: Text resolves over a surreal green field, the dress catching wind as she turns.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 2 to 4s, the product and brand line.

beats.visual: A clean Masonry panel appears with the Reformation brand assets loaded in.

beats.vo: And it carries across every frame.
beats.visual: The model walks a winding path through a dreamy landscape, the look continuous as she moves.
A giant rose blooms behind the model, the first generated scene in the world.

beats.vo: And the next clip just connects.
beats.visual: The model climbs a ladder up into the clouds, one scene flowing seamlessly into the next.

beats.vo: Because Masonry is a creative agent.
beats.visual: The model floats weightless mid-air, the dreamy brand world cohesive all around her.

beats.vo: One note, and every shot connects.
beats.visual: A single instruction card, then a quick sweep of matching frames spinning past.
A grid of dreamy Reformation frames, all consistent in palette and mood.
Two tall trees curve into the shape of hands cradling the scene below.
The model stands in the surreal field, the world staying continuous around her.
A short, plain prompt is typed into Masonry.
The generated result reveals, on brand and dreamy, no manual step in between.
The Reformation world rendered cohesively, the model framed by drifting clouds.

beats.vo: This is how a campaign comes together now.
beats.visual: A slow sweep across the finished frames, a complete dreamy campaign in one world.
The model serene in the field, the brand look locked in across the set.

beats.vo: Comment AGENT and we will send you the link.
beats.visual: End card: the trees-as-hands motif, Reformation wordmark with a small made-with-Masonry credit.

notes: Demo brand is Reformation, a realistic stand-in for a D2C fashion client (swap in the actual client when producing). Every scene and model would be generated with Masonry holding the brand context; no media has been generated yet (generation is gated on separate approval). The source promoted a competitor video agent and the keyword INVIDEO; the integration here is Masonry and the keyword was changed to AGENT. Keep total runtime near 42s to match the reference.
refsummary: The original (adrianabubori) sells an AI video agent that holds your brand context across every shot instead of forgetting it: set product, brand and look once, give one note, and every frame stays on brand. Watch it for the agent-that-remembers framing; our version makes that agent Masonry.
story: Same creative-agent framing, reframed to Masonry with Reformation as the demo brand. Arc: HOOK, what if AI video remembered your brand? SET ONCE, your product, your brand, your look, set up once and held across every shot. THE AGENT, one note and every dreamy frame stays on brand, no managing models, no rebuilding context. CLOSE, describe what you want, it picks the shot, comment AGENT. The viewer should see Masonry as a creative agent that carries brand context so they never rebuild it shot to shot.
takeaway: Masonry works like a creative agent that remembers your whole brand, so you set it up once and every shot stays on brand from a single note.
